items.title: Is AI A Bubble? Yes... And No
items.description: Is AI's market impact overhyped? Read why cautious investment in proven tech giants could offer better long-term financial stability.

items.title: Tech Is Valued as if AI Is the Next Smartphone. It Isn’t.
items.description: Investors don’t care if AI stocks are pricey as long as companies deliver hefty profits. But what happens if those profits shrink a lot?

items.title: Walmart, IBD Stock Of The Day, Runs Past Buy Point On OpenAI Shopping Partnership
items.description: Walmart stock gained on a partnership with OpenAI to allow shoppers to purchase goods directly through ChatGPT.

items.title: Is Amazon (AMZN) One of The Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy Right Now?
items.description: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy Right Now. The company enjoys a wide moat, which stems from its strong network effects and intangible assets. On October 7, analyst John Blackledge of TD Cowen reiterated a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock, retaining the price objective of $255.00. The […]
